rationale: Page-0 heading reads 'FOREIGN NONPROFIT CORPORATION' — the entity is a foreign nonprofit. Per 2026-04-30-entity-name-vs-home-jurisdiction.md, foreign-form name fields use entity.home_jurisdiction_name (the corp's name in its home jurisdiction) rather than entity.name (Maine-record name). This is the same convention used by CORP_FICT-4 / LLC_MLLC-12 / CORP_HO-E911 / NP_MNPCA-2.
Date the statement of abandonment is signed (per SECOND, takes effect upon filing).

label_verbatim: *By ____ (signature of an officer or other duly authorized representative) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined printed-name-and-capacity widget. Shape D per 2026-04-30-filing-signer-shape.md (matches MBCA-11, MBCA-12, MLLC-12, MBCA-19A). The *By signature line above this widget is decorative — not bound to an AcroForm widget; the actual signature is applied post-print.
